violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Employee cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

The ceiling in the back prep and ware-washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Establishment is currently undergoing renovation per manager. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Observed several damped mops not being air dried. Proper drying of mops was reviewed. Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Mops were relocated to designated spot to air dry. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Per interview of manager the unused equipment will be donated/or removed. Establishment is currently undergoing renovations. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

Observed dim lighting in walk-in cooler. Proper lighting intensity was reviewed. At least 108 lux (10-foot candles) at a distance of 75 cm (30 inches) above the floor, in walk-in refrigeration units and dry FOOD storage areas and in other areas and rooms during periods of cleaning. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025
The ceiling in the back prep and ware-washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
